dialogos.texto_en: We're arrived, this is it.\nI wanted to show you this view.
It's completely different compared to the view\nfrom the Kouri Bridge,\nbut it's quite something, isn't it?
Yes...\nThe ocean, the horizon, the cape, and the sandy beach.\nThey preserved the natural beauty of the landscape.
Rather than calling it beautiful...\nLooking at it makes me realize how vast the sea is.\nEven though it's obvious that the sea is vast.
I understand what you mean.\nLooking at this landscape, the word 'majestic' comes to mind.
I didn't know there was such a place.
This place is called Kafu Banta.\nIt's a hidden, scenic that's called\nthe 'Happy Cliff.' It's a power spot.
Happy Cliff?
Yeah, there's a legend that those who come here\nwill become happy.
I thought you would like it.\nThat's why I brought you here.
Is that so...\nThank you, Futaro.
Well, I'm not trying to act like I know everything,\nbut I actually found out about this place last night.
I wanted to find a place that would make you happy\nand be a fitting end to our trip...\ndo you like it?
Of course.
I'm really happy.\nFutaro, you looked it up for me...
Nino.\nThere's another reason why I brought you here.\nPlease listen to me.
O-okay.\nWhat is it?
I love you, Nino.
From now on, it'll be a long-distance relationship.\nBut my feelings for you won't change.
They're feelings brought on\nby the fact that you entered my life, Nino.
It's not like a vow...\nor anything like that, but...
I want to kiss you.
Huh...?
Of course I'm not gonna force anything.\nIf you don't want to, tell me.
But, if you're alright...
Oh come on, that's quite a head-on attack.\nIt really kills the mood.
Ggh...
(Was that too stupidly honest?)
(Man, I wanted to say something with more atmosphere,\n but I couldn't think of anything else!)
I think it's actually really bold in a way,\nbut it's WAY too straightforward.\nIt was horrid. The worst.
D-do you have to be so harsh?
But, I like that about you, Futaro.
It's barely passing as creating a kissing atmosphere,\nbut for you, Futaro, it's not bad.
So...is it okay with you?
Stop asking.
(Until now, I've been kissed by Nino,\n but I've never kissed her myself.)
(I didn't feel it at that time.\n The feeling that's bubbling up now is%p-2;――%p;)
(Maybe it's a feeling of love.)
It's frustrating to barely pass.\nI'll eventually get a perfect score.
Teehee. My grading system is much harsher\nthan yours, when you were our tutor, Futaro.
A higher hurdle makes things more exciting.\nI'll keep trying until I get a perfect score.
You'll keep trying, huh...
Make sure you get a perfect score\nby our wedding vow kiss.
Huh...
Even if it's your first perfect score\nfrom a vow kiss, I'll forgive you.
